user.title: GARO EV Charger
user.description: Enter the connection details for your GARO charger. Credentials are printed on a sticker on the physical device.

data.enable_phase_sensors: Enable per-phase sensors (L1/L2/L3 current and voltage)
data.enable_line_voltages: Enable line-to-line voltage sensors (L1-L2, L2-L3, L3-L1)

data_description.scan_interval: How often to fetch live data: power, current, voltage, charging state, CP/PP levels.
data_description.slow_scan_interval: How often to fetch data that rarely changes: temperatures, firmware version, device ID, network info, SIM and PLC status.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the device. Check the host address and network.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid credentials. Check username and password (password is case-sensitive, use lowercase).
error.slow_must_be_gte_fast: Slow poll interval must be greater than or equal to the fast poll interval.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the Home Assistant logs.

error.slow_must_be_gte_fast: Slow poll interval must be greater than or equal to the fast poll interval.

data.enable_phase_sensors: Enable per-phase sensors (L1/L2/L3 current and voltage)
data.enable_line_voltages: Enable line-to-line voltage sensors (L1-L2, L2-L3, L3-L1)

data_description.scan_interval: How often to fetch live data: power, current, voltage, charging state, CP/PP levels. Default: 15 s.
data_description.slow_scan_interval: How often to fetch data that rarely changes: temperatures, firmware version, device ID, network info, SIM and PLC status. Default: 300 s.
